inline_comments.message:
Use property source @PropertySource("file:${server.local.startpath}/aaf/permissions.properties")
As this will give the ability to override the properties file for different environments if needed.

Correct me please if I am wrong but:

1. server.local.startpath is defined inside application.properties, how do we change this property? Isn't it the same as if you directly change the value in permissions.properties?

2. it seems (but maybe I am wrong) application.properties is not even being read by the application, so the server.local.startpath is undefined throught the application

If 1. and 2. are true (which I am not 100% certain that it is), then your request doesn't make sense.

Any property defined in the application.properties can be overriden if the system property overwrites. If you look at the docker-entrypoint.sh, then you will see that it gets overwritten there. Please check this documentation:

https://docs.spring.io/spring-boot/docs/current/reference/html/boot-features-external-config.html
